propositions: A read-only single-column finding-centric page at /ticket/<id> renders plan, completion, and code gate results from the landed audit_trail read layer without modifying any data model.
A sticky gate-status strip shows all three gate verdicts with magnitude counts simultaneously, each chip anchoring to its detail section rendered in fixed plan->completion->code order.
Plan-review finding rows expand in place to the four-pass provenance (Finding/Verification/Decision/Coaching), while code-review rows render only their present fields and degrade gracefully.

A neutral per-finding threshold meter fills to priority with a tick at the finding's own persisted block_threshold, colored by decision series, falling back to a 'threshold not recorded (v1)' caption when absent.
Findings are grouped into four canonical decision series (blocking, advisory incl. overflow, dropped, indeterminate) with blocking expanded and others collapsed-and-counted, sorted by priority.

A convergence visualization renders conv-bars for <=3 rounds and a conv-line svg (one polyline per non-empty series) for >=4 rounds, each with a visually-hidden screen-reader data table, selectable via a no-js round selector query param.
